title: urera jacquinii var. ulmifolia
intro: Urera jacquinii var. ulmifolia, also known as the nettle tree or nettle bush, is a type of plant species within the nettle family (Urticaceae). It is a tropical plant native to the Pacific Islands, particularly in the regions of Polynesia and Melanesia. The medicinal properties of Urera jacquinii var. ulmifolia include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions, including wounds and skin infections. Herbal preparations of this plant include infusions and decoctions, which can be used to alleviate symptoms such as fever and cough, and to promote wound healing.
